Keyword_Questions.Keyword: What is a keyword or term used in MAIDS that you believe would be helpful to describe the keyword?
Keyword_Questions.Definition: What is the definition of the keyword?
Keyword_Questions.Link: What is the link to online material further discussing of the keyword?

Keyword_1.Definition: Clear cell renal cell carcinoma, the dominant histologic subtype of kidney cancer represented in this study.

Keyword_2.Definition: Web platform for interactive exploration of cancer genomics datasets, including study ccrcc_irc_2014.

Keyword_3.Definition: Sampling and sequencing multiple spatial regions from the same tumor to detect subclonal diversity and intratumor heterogeneity.

Keyword_4.Definition: Genomic and phenotypic variation within a single tumor, a focus of the Gerlinger et al. (2014) analysis.

Keyword_5.Definition: Medical AI Datasheet — structured transparency documentation for datasets used in medical AI and related research.
